task_completion.description: The agent created the required R script file in RStudio.

task_completion.description: The script contains logic to read the VCF file and filter variants based on missing data and read depth.
task_completion.visual_evidence: R code in the editor shows functions to read the VCF (e.g., read.vcfR) and filtering conditions specifically targeting > 20% missing data (or < 80% call rate) and mean DP (read depth) < 5.

integrity.description: The agent computed the variant counts dynamically rather than hardcoding fabricated numbers.

integrity.description: The agent utilized the RStudio GUI to write the script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the RStudio interface (editor pane, console) rather than writing the entire script blindly via terminal commands like 'cat' or 'echo'.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the R script to manually create empty output files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal does not show commands like 'touch /home/ga/RProjects/output/population_pca.png' or 'echo ... > variant_qc_summary.csv' used to fake the final outputs.
